status_notes: Initial entry for PASTA threat modeling methodology. Reviewed 2026-04-05.

match_nodes.description: Process for Attack Simulation and Threat Analysis (PASTA): seven-stage, risk-centric threat modeling methodology. Stages: define objectives, define technical scope, application decomposition, threat analysis, vulnerability analysis, attack modeling, risk/impact analysis. Created by Tony UcedaVelez and Marco Morana.
